reviews.comment:
Buena atención en general. Reciben tarjetas en la playa de carga. Buen lugar para parar a descansar. Baños limpios. Pero no tienen bar comedor. No preparan comidas

(Translated by Google)
Overall good service. They accept credit cards at the loading dock. A good place to stop and rest. Clean bathrooms. But they don't have a bar or dining room. They don't serve food.
